reasoning: On May 2, 2025, Rockstar Games officially announced that Grand Theft Auto VI is delayed until May 26, 2026 for PlayStation 5 and Xbox Series X|S. Multiple authoritative outlets (Bloomberg, BBC, IGN, GameSpot) reported this delay. Because the resolution criteria state that the question resolves to No if the game is not released in Europe in 2025, and the global release date is now firmly set in 2026, the probability of a 2025 European release is effectively zero. I am forecasting the minimum allowed probability of 2%.
